info.name: IntraVox
info.summary: SharePoint-style intranet pages for Nextcloud — no code required
info.description:
IntraVox transforms Nextcloud into a full-featured intranet platform. Build professional pages with a visual drag-and-drop editor — no coding required. A complete, open-source alternative to SharePoint.
**Page editor:** * Drag-and-drop widget placement with flexible grid layouts (1–5 columns) * 7 ready-made page templates to get started quickly * Collapsible sections, sticky toolbar, and row duplication * Draft/Published workflow with page locking to prevent conflicts
**Rich widget library:** * Text (with tables and markdown), images, video, links, files, dividers * Calendar widget with multi-calendar merged view and recurring events * People widget with user profiles, filters, and birthday tracking * News widget with list, grid, and carousel layouts * Photo Story widget — photo galleries with EXIF metadata, OpenStreetMap location clustering, and an accessible Apple-style lightbox * File Story widget — document libraries with timeline, list, tiles, and grouped layouts; MetaVox-aware filtering; federated-share awareness
**Collaboration & engagement:** * Emoji reactions and threaded comments on pages * Version history with one-click restore * Personal RSS feed for following page updates * Public sharing with optional password protection
**Content management:** * Multi-language support — admins choose which Transifex-translated languages to enable * Navigation editor with megamenu and sidebar options * Full export/import to ZIP — including Confluence HTML import * Demo content to get started in minutes
**Enterprise ready:** * Department-based access control via Team folders ACL * Nextcloud Unified Search integration (Ctrl+K) * Seamless theming, users, groups, and files integration
**Requirements:** * Nextcloud 32, 33, or 34 * PHP 8.2 or higher * Team folders app (installed and enabled)
**Ideal for:** * Company intranets and news portals * Department knowledge bases * Internal communication and documentation * SharePoint-to-Nextcloud migrations
info.author: VoxCloud
